mechanism: Non-Gaussian carry tail events drive correlation amplification (carry-equity correlation 0.3-0.4 → 0.7-0.8 during stress), causing PCA dimensionality to collapse as all risk assets converge to a single dollar factor.
regime_dependence: Operates during stress regimes only; in normal regimes the 3-factor PCA structure (dollar 50-70%, carry 15-20%, momentum 8-12%) is stable.
